name: 中考从句专项 · 第一辑（定语 / 宾语 / 状语从句）
desc: 中考三大从句一网打尽：定语从句(who/which/that/whose/where/when、最高级用 that、介词+which)、宾语从句(陈述语序、whether/if、时态呼应、what vs that)、状语从句(because≠so 连用、although≠but、so/such…that、unless、主将从现)。配对记规则 + 句境选词，答案唯一带解析。进阶免费档。

m1: 指人：who 作主语、whom 作宾语（The man who called…）
指物，作主语或宾语（The book which…）
指人或物；先行词含 the only / 最高级 / 序数 / all 时首选
表所属：谁的（The boy whose father…）
关系副词 = in / at which，先行词是地点（the town where…）
关系副词 = in / on which，先行词是时间（the day when…）
m2: Do you know where he lives（不是 does he live）
引导「是否」；介词后、or not 前只能用 whether
陈述内容，常可省略（I think (that)…）
主句过去 → 从句相应用过去（He said he was…）
在从句中作成分「什么」（≠ that 不作成分）
主句现在 → 从句时态不限
I think he is / was / will be…（不受制约）
m3: because 不与 so 连用
「因为…所以…」英文只留一个连词
although / though 不与 but 连用
so + 形容词 / 副词 + that
such a good book that…（so 接形容词，such 接名词）
除非（引导条件，主将从现）
时间状语从句常用连词

m4.q: The girl ___ won the first prize is my classmate.
m4.why: 先行词 the girl 指人、在从句中作主语 → who；which 指物；whom 作宾语；whose 表所属。

m4.q: This is the most interesting book ___ I have ever read.
m4.why: 先行词被最高级 most 修饰，关系词只能用 that；what 不引导定语从句。

m4.q: I know a boy ___ father is a famous doctor.
This is the small village ___ I spent my childhood.
m4.why: 先行词 village 是地点、从句不缺宾语 → 关系副词 where(= in which)；which / that 需再补介词。

ops: where does the post office lie
m4.why: 宾语从句用陈述语序 → where the post office is。

m4.q: I'm not sure ___ he will come or not.
m4.why: 「是否」+ or not 只能用 whether（不用 if）；that 不表「是否」。
主句过去(wanted)，宾从时态呼应用过去 + 陈述语序 → where I lived。

m4.q: The old house ___ we once lived is being pulled down.
m4.why: live in the house → 介词 + 关系代词 = in which(= where)；which 单独用缺了介词。

ops: Because he was ill, so he stayed at home.
Because he was ill, he stayed at home.
He was ill, so because he stayed home.
Although he was ill, but he stayed home.
m5.why: 「因为…所以…」「虽然…但是…」英文只留一个连词 → B 对；A because+so 重复、C 语序错、D although+but 重复。

m5.q: The box was ___ heavy ___ I couldn't lift it at all.
m5.why: so + 形容词(heavy) + that…「如此…以至于…」；such 接名词、too…to 接动词、very 不接 that 从句。

m5.q: It was ___ that everyone wanted to read it.
m5.why: such + a/an + 形容词 + 单数名词 → such an interesting book；so 只接形容词/副词。

m5.q: You will miss the early train ___ you hurry up.
m5.why: unless = if not「除非」，符合「除非快点，否则赶不上」。

m5.q: We won't start the meeting ___ everyone ___ here.
m5.why: until 引导时间状语从句，主句将来、从句用一般现在(主将从现)，everyone → arrives。

m5.q: ___ he said at the meeting made us think a lot.
m5.why: What 引导主语从句并在从句中作 said 的宾语；That 引导时从句不缺成分(此处缺宾语) → 用 What。

m5.q: He spoke loudly ___ everyone at the back could hear him.
m5.why: so that 引导目的状语从句「以便」；so…that 是「如此…以至于」的结果状语，语义不同。

m5.q: I believe ___ honesty matters most, and that is ___ this story teaches us.
m5.why: 第一空宾语从句不缺成分 → that(可省)；第二空「这个故事教给我们的东西」缺宾语 → what。
